title: phyllobolus deciduus
intro: Phyllobolus deciduus, also known as the "dune hair-pellitory," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the borage family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Phyllobolus deciduus include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, protecting the body from oxidative stress. Phyllobolus deciduus is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and can also be found in tincture or capsule form, making it a popular natural remedy for respiratory issues.
